info.title: Azure Storage Queues Monitor: Utility to monitor Azure Storage Queues

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Azure Storage Queues Monitor: Utility to monitor Azure Storage Queues

options.name: --title
options.description:
Optional. A title
to be shown on the
console window.
Useful to
differentiate
environments or
when using
multiple
instances.

options.name: --connectionstring
options.description:
Required, but can
be omitted if
supplied in
configuration
file. The Azure
Storage connection
string, in which
the queues will be
monitored.

options.name: --pollinginterval
options.description:
Optional. The
interval between
the pollings of
the queues, in
milliseconds.
Defaults to 2000
milliseconds if
ommited.

options.name: --config
options.description:
Optional. Json
configuration file
containing the
Title,
ConnectionString
and
PollingInterval
options. If this
option is
supplied, all
other options are
ignored.

options.name: --showEmptyQueues
options.description:
Optional.
Indicates if empty
queues must be
shown. If not
specified, only
non-empty queues
will be shown
after the refresh.

options.name: --orderByQueueSize
options.description:
Optional.
Indicates if the
ordered by size,
then by name. If
not specified, the
queues will be
ordered by name
only.

options.name: --exportCountData
options.description:
Optional.
queues counting
must be exported
over time. This is
useful for
plotting graphs os
historical
analysis.

options.name: --exportFolderPath
options.description:
Optional.
Indicates the
folder path for
count data
exporting. If not
specified, the
current user
documents folder
shall be used. The
file name pattern
is
'azqmon_YYYYMMDDHHMMSS.csv.

options.name: --ignore
options.description:
Optional.
Indicates a queue
name pattern
(regex) to ignore.

options.name: --important
options.description:
Optional.
(regex) to
consider as
important.
Important queues
are emphasized in
exhibition.
